common.condition_behavior_description: How the state should match on the targeted batteries.

is_charging.description: Tests if one or more batteries are charging.
is_charging.name: Battery is charging

is_low.description: Tests if one or more batteries are low.
is_low.name: Battery is low

is_not_charging.description: Tests if one or more batteries are not charging.
is_not_charging.name: Battery is not charging

is_not_low.description: Tests if one or more batteries are not low.
is_not_low.name: Battery is not low

percentage.description: Tests the percentage of one or more batteries.

above.description: Require the percentage to be above this value.
above.name: Above

below.description: Require the percentage to be below this value.
below.name: Below

percentage.name: Battery percentage
